visual_description:
A close-up shot focuses on two men in what appears to be an office or meeting room. The man in the foreground, on the left, is middle-aged with short, dark hair. He wears a white, short-sleeved uniform shirt with a black tie and a black and white epaulet on his left shoulder. He is speaking with a serious expression, looking slightly to his right. To his right, a younger man is seen in profile, looking down with a somber demeanor. He also wears a light-colored shirt and a dark tie. In the top left corner of the screen, white Chinese characters are visible. The background is a simple office interior. The camera remains static, maintaining a tight focus on the two men. A man speaks in a serious and somber tone, his voice steady and deliberate as he makes a statement. "Inspector Wong is a good police officer." The audio is quiet, with no background music or other significant sound effects, creating a still and focused atmosphere that emphasizes the gravity of his words.

The camera cuts to a high-angle, wide shot of the entire meeting room. Five men are now visible, seated around a large, dark-colored conference table. The middle-aged man from the previous shot is at the head of the table
